# Funding

If you want to support ongoing maintenance and development of `tsnmp`, the
project currently points to the following funding profiles:

## GitHub

- [@tosumitdhaka](https://github.com/tosumitdhaka)

## Buy Me a Coffee

- `tosumitdhaka`

Funding helps support:

- maintenance and bug fixes
- testing and release work
- documentation improvements
- longer-term SNMP runtime and tooling work
